string.text: Date: So ... the headquarters sends it to the zone again, damn ... How I do not want to return there.
Date: That's the perimeter, now, as usual, they will arrange a medical examination worse than that of astronauts.
Date: Not lucky, health allows - eh, to be a military man. Okay, in the zone ... with God.
Date: It seems that the landing should go through the vicinity of the dome. Well ... I have never been there yet.
Date: We will get to the place soon, it's so strange - when flying in the sky, so many anomalies sparkled next to us!
Date: Here is a landing, damn ... That's it, I turn off the C-livaries. It's time to fight.
Date: Something our client is delayed. Everything seems to be under the pretext - transactions with mercenaries.
Date: The deal is disrupted. I hide the case, go to the place of evacuation. The task is completed. Lucky ...
Exit (ESC)
Close
Weapon repair is completed.
Repair is impossible: place the weapon in the second slot.
Repair is impossible: the weapon is too badly damaged.
Repair is impossible: weapons are in excellent condition.
The repair of the helmet is completed.
Repair is impossible: put on the helmet.
Repair is impossible: the helmet is too badly damaged.
Repair is impossible: a helmet in excellent condition.
Costume repair is completed.
Repair is impossible: put on a suit.
Repair is impossible: the costume is too badly damaged.
Repair is impossible: a suit in excellent condition.
Repair
Close
Prepare
Back
